title: boraginella stricta
intro: Boraginella stricta, also known as the African borage, is a plant species within the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to have medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which contribute to its potential in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Boraginella stricta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in a variety of ways.
